evals.prompt: Help me write a nuclei command to scan all targets in `targets.txt`, running only high and critical, and export the results to jsonl.
evals.expected_output: Give an executable command centered on `nuclei -l targets.txt -severity high,critical -jsonl-export ...`, with a brief explanation of the key parameters.

evals.prompt: I have a custom template `./templates/login-check.yaml`. I want to validate the template first, then run it against `https://staging.example.com`. Help me write the commands.
evals.expected_output: First give `-validate -t ./templates/login-check.yaml`, then give the command to run that template against the single target.

evals.prompt: How does `nuclei` run only templates with the exposure tag, while also carrying the Cookie `session=abc123` to scan `https://portal.example.com`?
evals.expected_output: Give the single-target scan command with `-tags exposure` and `-H 'Cookie: session=abc123'`, and point out that this is an authenticated scan.
